children.heading: Acquisition of lands and waters
children.label: a Acquisition of lands and waters
children.text: Nothing in this chapter affects, alters, or modifies the Secretary’s authorities, responsibilities, obligations, or powers to acquire lands or waters or interests therein under any other statute.

children.heading: Mitigation
children.label: b Mitigation
children.text: The Federal funds made available under this chapter and may not be used for fish and wildlife mitigation purposes under the Fish and Wildlife Coordination Act ( et seq.) or the Water Resources Development Act of 1986, (1986), .section 669b(b) of this title16 U.S.C. 661Public Law 99–662100 Stat. 4235
